stations.name: Closest stations are South Brisbane and Park Road
stations.walk_minutes_note: Walkable for parts of Kangaroo Point.

ferry.terminal: Multiple CityCat terminals along the Kangaroo Point cliffs

buses.note: Bus routes serve Kangaroo Point via Main Street and Lytton Road.

driving.motorway_access: Story Bridge for CBD travel. Pacific Motorway and South-East Freeway access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 3 to 6 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak via Story Bridge.

connections: Kangaroo Point Bridge (pedestrian and cyclist) to the CBD

secondary_state.name: Brisbane State High catchment may apply for parts

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Kangaroo Point has dining clusters along Main Street and the riverside precinct. Howard Smith Wharves sits across the river. South Bank cultural precinct is a short walk via the Goodwill Bridge.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along the Kangaroo Point Cliffs and the riverwalk.

pockets.name: Riverside / Cliffs
pockets.character: Apartment stock with CBD and river views. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Main Street precinct
pockets.character: Mix of apartment and townhouse stock close to the dining strip.

pockets.name: Park Road area
pockets.character: Closer to the train and the Gabba.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting walk or short drive to the CBD with river views.
Long-term Brisbane residents moving to apartment living with the CBD outlook.
Strong rental demand close to the CBD.
